key_predictive_features: Gold/silver ratio velocity (ratio compressed 62:1 to 55:1 in single week May 2026 — strongest move in years)
COT speculative net long: 24,671 contracts (34,591 long - 9,920 short) as of May 19, down 1,978 from prior week — moderate deleveraging
Commercial net short: -42,668 contracts (69,776 short vs 27,108 long) — producers heavily hedged at these levels
DXY 5d momentum (inverse correlation remains strong)
Copper/gold ratio (industrial demand proxy)
China silver export license restrictions (Jan 2026 tightening squeezing physical supply)
Solar PV industrial demand — BUT 19% demand drop expected in 2026 as manufacturers substitute away from silver at $75+ prices
ETF/ETP retail inflows overwhelming industrial demand pullback
Supply deficit: 46.3 Moz shortfall projected (6th consecutive year)

fundamental_drivers.supply_deficit: 46.3 Moz shortfall projected for 2026, sixth consecutive deficit year. Mine supply constrained because silver is 70%+ byproduct of base metal mining — production decisions follow copper/zinc/lead economics, not silver price.
fundamental_drivers.industrial_demand: Solar PV demand expected to DROP 19% in 2026 as high prices ($75+) force manufacturer substitution. However, AI data center + 5G + EV demand partially offsets. Net industrial still growing but slower.
fundamental_drivers.physical_market: China tightened silver export licenses Jan 2026, squeezing global physical supply. Retail coin/bar demand surging despite high prices, causing liquidity squeezes.
fundamental_drivers.central_bank_context: Silver not directly held by central banks (unlike gold), but benefits from gold safe-haven rotation. Gold central bank buying (reserve diversification) supports metals complex broadly.
fundamental_drivers.real_yield_headwind: Treasury yields remain elevated — CPI at 3.8% in April, highest since Sep 2023. Fed rate cut expectations pushed back. Non-yielding metals face headwind, but deficit + industrial demand offsetting.

cross_asset_correlations.gold: Strong positive (0.85+). Gold/silver ratio at 55:1 (below 50yr avg of 65-70), implying silver outperformance phase. Ratio below 60 historically signals silver acceleration.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY: Strong inverse. DXY strength = silver weakness.
cross_asset_correlations.copper: Moderate positive (industrial demand proxy). Watch copper/gold ratio for industrial vs safe-haven regime.
cross_asset_correlations.US_10Y_real_yield: Moderate inverse. Higher real yields = gold/silver headwind. Currently elevated.
cross_asset_correlations.SPX: Weak positive in risk-on, decouples in crisis. Silver's dual role (industrial + monetary) creates regime-dependent correlation.

seasonal_patterns.current_position: Late May — entering historically weak June period. June is one of worst months for silver (seasonal pattern: sharp decline).
seasonal_patterns.Q2_pattern: April-June shows weakness, with June marking seasonal low.
seasonal_patterns.Q3_recovery: July is historically 2nd best month (63.6% positive), strong recovery from June lows through September.
seasonal_patterns.tactical_implication: User holds 107.68 oz at ~$74.84. Seasonal weakness into June could offer add-to-position opportunity if thesis holds. July-September recovery phase historically strong.

papers_and_models: CME Group 2026 Precious Metals Outlook: gold/silver ratio velocity and DXY momentum as strongest predictors
Silver Institute 2026 forecast: sustained supply deficit exposes market to squeeze risk
BofA (Widmer): 10-15% investment demand increase causes outsized price effects due to silver's smaller/less liquid market vs gold
ING Think: volatility set to drive silver in 2026, structural deficit vs rate headwinds

recommended_new_signals.description: Track commercial net short as % of open interest. When commercials are extremely hedged (>65% of OI short), it often marks interim tops. Currently at 69,776/100,751 = 69.2% — near extreme.
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Extend existing COT signal to track commercial positioning ratio, not just speculative net

recommended_new_signals.description: Gold/silver ratio 5-day ROC. The 62:1 to 55:1 compression in a single week was a major signal. Fast ratio compression = silver outperformance acceleration.
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Extract from metals_cross_assets.py where ratio is already computed. Deploy as shadow signal.

recommended_new_signals.description: Shanghai vs COMEX silver premium tracks physical tightness. China export license restrictions create measurable premium differential.
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Would need Shanghai exchange data feed. Defer unless free API found.

recommended_new_signals.description: Confidence adjustment based on monthly seasonal pattern. Reduce SELL confidence in January/July (strong months), reduce BUY confidence in June/September (weak months).
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Add to existing seasonality framework in signals/calendar_signal.py

deep_dives.implementation_notes: Priority 1: gs_ratio_rate_of_change (data already computed, 1 day effort). Priority 2: cot_commercial_hedge_ratio (extends existing COT, 1-2 day effort). Priority 3: silver_seasonality_overlay (modifier only, 0.5 day effort). China physical premium deferred — data sourcing problem.

key_predictive_features: MVRV Z-Score: 0.41 as of May 8 — fair value zone, neither overvalued nor undervalued. Market trading near aggregate realized cost basis.
Exchange reserves at 7-year low — structural supply squeeze on exchanges
Whale accumulation: net-bought 270K BTC in 30 days despite ETF outflows
ETF flows: 6-day outflow streak through May 22, draining $1.55B. Total 2026 net inflows only $536M remaining. Record single-day outflow $635M on May 13.
Options skew: Put/Call OI ratio 1.16 (bearish lean), Put/Call premium ratio 5.17 (significantly bearish). 63.3% short positioning — most bearishly skewed major asset.
BlackRock IBIT holds $62B BTC — institutional anchor
Funding rates: near neutral for BTC, only LINK showing negative funding
CPI at 3.8% (highest since Sep 2023) — rate cut expectations pushed back, macro headwind

fundamental_drivers.on_chain: MVRV Z-Score at 0.41 = fair value, no extreme readings. Exchange reserves at 7yr low is structurally bullish (less liquid supply). Whale accumulation (270K BTC / 30 days) diverges from ETF outflows — smart money accumulating while institutional ETF holders retreat.
fundamental_drivers.etf_dynamics: May 2026 ETF outflows driven by macro (CPI 3.8%, rate cut delay). BlackRock (-$68.9M) and Fidelity (-$36.3M) contributing. But total 2026 net inflows still positive at $536M — not a capitulation signal yet. ETF flow reversals are mean-reverting (April was strongest month since Oct 2025 at $2.44B inflows).
fundamental_drivers.derivatives: 63.3% short positioning is EXTREME. Put/Call premium ratio 5.17 means puts are ~5x more expensive than calls. This creates significant short squeeze potential if price holds above $80K. Historically, such extreme short positioning resolves with a squeeze rather than following through.
fundamental_drivers.macro_headwind: CPI 3.8%, highest since Sep 2023. Fed rate cuts pushed back. Strong dollar. BTC struggling at $75-80K range. However, whale accumulation during macro headwinds is classic pre-breakout pattern.

cross_asset_correlations.MSTR: 90-day correlation 0.874 with IBIT. MSTR amplifies BTC moves with ~1.5x beta in practice despite declining mNAV premium.
cross_asset_correlations.gold: Weak positive (both 'hard money' assets), but gold has been significantly outperforming BTC in 2026 due to central bank buying.
cross_asset_correlations.SPX: Moderate positive in risk-on. BTC increasingly trading as risk asset, correlated with tech/growth.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY: Moderate inverse. Strong dollar = BTC headwind.
cross_asset_correlations.US_10Y: Moderate inverse. Higher yields compress risk asset valuations.

seasonal_patterns.current_position: Late May — historically mixed for BTC.
seasonal_patterns.q2_pattern: BTC typically consolidates in Q2 after Q1 moves. 2026 following this pattern (rangebound $75-85K).
seasonal_patterns.q3_breakout: Q3 (Jul-Sep) historically strong for BTC breakouts. 2021, 2023, 2024 all had significant Q3 rallies.
seasonal_patterns.tactical_implication: SELL signals were noise all day on May 27. With MVRV at fair value, extreme short positioning (63.3%), and whale accumulation, the setup favors patience through Q2 consolidation for Q3 breakout. System should reduce SELL signal confidence during rangebound periods.

papers_and_models: Bitcoin Foundation 2026: best indicators for market timing (MVRV, SOPR, exchange netflow, NVT)
SpotedCrypto May 2026: whale + ETF divergence analysis
CoinMarketCap: ETF 6-day outflow analysis and mean-reversion patterns

recommended_new_signals.description: Track rolling 5-day net ETF flow momentum. 6-day outflow streaks historically mean-revert. BUY signal when cumulative 5d outflow exceeds -$1B (contrarian). SELL on 5d inflow > $2B (overheating).
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Data available from CoinGlass API or Glassnode. Would need new data source integration.

recommended_new_signals.description: Put/Call premium ratio > 4.0 = extreme bearish skew = contrarian BUY. Current 5.17 is extreme. Track via Deribit or CoinGlass options data. Historical: extreme put skew resolves via squeeze 65%+ of time.
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Needs Deribit API or CoinGlass options endpoint. Not currently integrated.

recommended_new_signals.description: When whale accumulation (exchange outflows) diverges from ETF outflows, it signals institutional vs retail divergence. Whale-side historically wins. Currently: whales buying 270K/30d while ETFs hemorrhaging.
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Combine existing exchange netflow from onchain_data.py with new ETF flow data source.

recommended_new_signals.description: Partition MVRV Z-Score into zones: <0 (deep value BUY), 0-1 (fair value HOLD), 1-3 (heated SELL), >3 (euphoria strong SELL). Currently at 0.41 = fair value HOLD. Better than current monolithic on-chain composite.
recommended_new_signals.expected_accuracy: 65-70% on 10d+ horizon (macro cycle signal, not short-term)
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Refactor existing onchain_btc.py to separate MVRV into standalone zone-based signal.

deep_dives.implementation_notes: Priority 1: mvrv_zone_regime (data already collected via onchain_data.py, just needs zone logic, 1 day). Priority 2: options_skew_extreme (needs new data source, high expected accuracy, 2-3 days). Priority 3: etf_flow_momentum (new data source + contrarian logic, 2 days). Priority 4: whale_etf_divergence (composite of existing + new, 2 days). Key insight: today's all-day SELL noise was likely from short-term signals ignoring the macro fair-value + extreme short positioning setup. The mvrv_zone_regime signal would have correctly generated HOLD, overriding noisy short-term SELL signals.

key_predictive_features: mNAV premium/discount: currently 0.94x (6% DISCOUNT to NAV). Stock at $159.93, BTC NAV ~$170+. First sustained discount since 2022.
BTC correlation: 90-day correlation 0.874 with IBIT. Acts as ~1.5x leveraged BTC play.
BTC holdings: 843,738 BTC at avg cost $75,700/coin. Total purchase price $63.87B. Recent buy: 24,869 BTC at $80,985/coin (May 11-17).
Options market: IV 63.7%, total OI $42.3B ($22.1B calls, $20.19B puts). P/C OI ratio ~0.91 (slightly bullish tilt). Avg duration 150.6 days.
Dilution risk: continued ATM share sales to fund BTC purchases. Market pricing in dilution via NAV discount.
Debt load: $8.2B corporate debt backed by volatile BTC collateral

fundamental_drivers.nav_dynamics: MSTR trading at 0.94x mNAV is a structural shift. Market says the corporate wrapper (debt, dilution, management overhead, regulatory risk) DESTROYS value rather than creates it. This is a reversal from 2024-2025 when MSTR traded at 2-3x mNAV. The compression was partially caused by the Bitcoin ETF options market cannibalizing MSTR's 'leveraged BTC exposure' value proposition.
fundamental_drivers.btc_correlation: 87.4% correlation with IBIT means MSTR tracks BTC closely but with higher vol (IV 63.7%). The beta is approximately 1.5x — a 10% BTC move produces a ~15% MSTR move. This makes MSTR a leveraged play on BTC with corporate credit risk layered on top.
fundamental_drivers.capital_structure: $8.2B debt with BTC collateral. If BTC drops below ~$50K, debt coverage ratios become strained. Current BTC at ~$80K provides ~60% cushion over implied liquidation threshold. The ongoing ATM dilution funds BTC purchases but erodes per-share BTC exposure.
fundamental_drivers.earnings_irrelevance: MSTR's software business is negligible relative to BTC treasury. Earnings are essentially a mark-to-market of BTC holdings plus interest expense on debt. Stock is a pure BTC derivative with credit wrapping.
fundamental_drivers.etf_options_competition: VanEck analysis: Bitcoin ETF options (IBIT options) have partially 'killed' MSTR's premium by offering direct leveraged BTC exposure without corporate risk. This structural headwind is unlikely to reverse.

cross_asset_correlations.BTC: 0.874 (90-day). Primary driver. MSTR = leveraged BTC + credit risk.
cross_asset_correlations.IBIT: 0.874 (90-day). Near-identical to BTC correlation, confirming MSTR tracks spot BTC.
cross_asset_correlations.SPX: Moderate positive (0.4-0.5). MSTR is listed equity, so inherits some equity market beta.
cross_asset_correlations.US_10Y: Moderate inverse. Higher yields = higher cost of debt for MSTR + BTC headwind.
cross_asset_correlations.VIX: Moderate inverse. Risk-off = MSTR weakness (both as equity and as BTC proxy).

seasonal_patterns.current_position: MSTR follows BTC seasonality + US equity market seasonality. Currently in 'sell in May' period.
seasonal_patterns.earnings_catalysts: Q2 earnings (Aug) and any BTC purchase announcements are primary catalysts. Strategy has been buying BTC weekly via ATM program.
seasonal_patterns.btc_halvening_cycle: BTC halving was April 2024. Historically, 12-18 months post-halving (Apr-Oct 2025) is strongest period. We're now 25 months post-halving — later cycle. MSTR amplifies these cycle dynamics.

papers_and_models: VanEck 2026: 'Deconstructing Strategy (MSTR): Premium, Leverage, and Capital Structure' — detailed NAV decomposition
MarketVector: 'Did ETF Options Kill MicroStrategy?' — structural premium compression analysis
BitMEX 2026: 'MicroStrategy vs Bitcoin: Which to Trade' — correlation and leverage analysis
TradingKey: MSTR stock price prediction 2026-2030 framework

recommended_new_signals.description: Track mNAV ratio. Below 1.0 = discount to NAV = potential value. At 0.94x, MSTR is effectively offering BTC at 6% discount to spot. BUY signal when mNAV < 0.95, SELL when mNAV > 1.5. Currently: BUY zone.
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Compute from MSTR market cap / (BTC holdings * BTC price). Data available from strategy.com/mstr-tracker or bitcoinquant.co.

recommended_new_signals.description: When MSTR deviates from expected 1.5x BTC beta (underperforms or outperforms), it mean-reverts. Track rolling 5d MSTR return / BTC return ratio. Mean reversion when ratio deviates >2 std from 1.5.
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Pure price computation, no new data sources needed. Use existing MSTR + BTC-USD prices.

recommended_new_signals.description: MSTR IV at 63.7%. Track IV percentile rank over 252 days. High IV percentile (>80th) = mean-reversion opportunity after vol crush. Low IV (<20th) = potential breakout setup.
recommended_new_signals.implementation: Would need options data feed. Could proxy via historical MSTR realized vol vs implied.

deep_dives.implementation_notes: Priority 1: mstr_mnav_discount_depth (most actionable — current 6% discount is a clear value signal. Simple computation from existing data. 1 day effort). Priority 2: mstr_btc_beta_deviation (no new data needed, pure math, 0.5 day effort). Priority 3: mstr_options_iv_percentile (needs options data, defer). Key insight: today's 25% confidence BUY signals were calibration traps because the system doesn't know MSTR is at a NAV discount — it's treating MSTR as a generic stock. Adding mNAV awareness would have generated a higher-confidence BUY signal at 0.94x NAV.
